tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.en: Reading pages and computing information entropy...
tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.zh: 正在读取页面并计算信息熵...

tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。

tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.en: This tool generates a clickable table of contents from existing PDF bookmarks. Please ensure your PDF has bookmarks before using this tool. You can add bookmarks using the Edit Bookmarks tool.
tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.zh: 此工具从现有PDF书签生成可点击的目录。请确保您的PDF已有书签。您可以使用「编辑书签」工具添加书签。

tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here for 3D folding simulation.
tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行3D折页模拟。

tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF here to extract outline and charts for slide reconstruction.
tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，提取大纲与图表重建幻灯片。

tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.en: Slide reconstruction successful! Click to download PPTX file.
tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.zh: 幻灯片重建成功！点击下载PPTX文件。

tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.en: Analyzing document structure and extracting outlines...
tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.zh: 正在分析文档层级并提炼大纲...

tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.en: Scanning and isolating vector charts and tables as images...
tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.zh: 正在扫描分割矢量图表与表格并保存为独立图像...

tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF e-book here to optimize for e-Ink paper contrast.
tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF电子书到此处，进行墨水屏护眼黑白对比优化。

tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.en: e-Ink PDF optimization complete! File size successfully shrunk.
tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.zh: 护眼墨水屏PDF优化完成！文件已成功瘦身。

tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF here to apply a 3D wax seal and certificate lock.
tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以放置3D火漆印章及证书锁。

tools.certCryptor.optionsTitle.zh: 物理签名与证书加密选项

tools.certCryptor.successMessage.en: 3D wax-seal imprint and certificate-based encryption applied successfully!
tools.certCryptor.successMessage.zh: 3D火漆签名与双钥证书加密已成功执行！

tools.passportIdComposer.uploadDescripti.en: Drag & drop both front and back sides of passport/ID cards to compose A4 copy.
tools.passportIdComposer.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放身份证/护照正面与反面到此处进行拼大版。

tools.passportIdComposer.successMessage.zh: 国标证件双面拼版成功！

tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.en: Drag & drop PDF here to extract highlights, comments, and outline notebook.
tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以提取所有高亮及笔记大纲。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop PDF here to physically purge background watermarks.
tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以一键物理清除水印。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.successMessa.zh: 水印物理擦除净化完成！

tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.en: Drag & drop PDF here to automatically scan & redact privacy data.
tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行隐私脱敏。

tools.smartDataRedactor.processButton.zh: 自动扫描并脱敏敏感词

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDescr.en: Drag & drop PDF here to auto generate bookmarks from structure.
tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDescr.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处推导自动生成书签大纲。

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.processButt.zh: 一键推导并注入大纲书签

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMess.en: Bookmarks successfully injected into PDF Outline structure!
tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.successMess.zh: PDF多级书签物理注入成功！
